_comment: Stage 3.1 T1/T4 — golem-erp LLM-gateway upstream stub. Loaded at runtime into the
in-cluster WireMock via the §3 admin protocol (the Stage 2.1 InClusterWireMockLoader,
retargeted to this context's WireMock base URL). Golem's PlanComposer calls the LLM
gateway (Prometheus) to compose a MiniPlan; this stub stands in for the LLM upstream so
the turn is deterministic and offline.
PLACEHOLDER — the exact request match (gateway path) + the plan-shaped completion body
are finalised when the golem-erp context goes live (Ariadne + Prometheus charts land and
the real LlmGatewayClient wire shape is confirmed against the deployed gateway). Until
then GolemErpIntegrationSpec gates the answer-turn assertions OFF (liveContext = false).
